resources.string: Already have an account? Sign in
Everything is ready for secure scanning, organization, and AI-assisted review.
Sign in to sync documents, unlock cloud backup, and keep your workspace connected.
Ask better questions about every document
Summarize pages, extract key points, and get fast answers from scanned files and notes.
Frequently used actions arranged for fast daily document work.
Track output, notes, and next actions at a glance.
Ready to preview, share, or merge
Quick capture for ideas and drafts
Sign in to continue scanning, saving, and managing documents professionally.
Use email or Google to access synced scans, notes, and AI tools.
Set up a secure document workspace in a minute.
Create an account to back up files, use AI tools, and organize notes across sessions.
Scan, organize, sign, and summarize documents with one clean workspace.
Ready to present in under two minutes
Use the guided flow below to show document scanning, AI reasoning, and hands-free voice control without searching through the app live.
Scan or import a document and convert it into a polished PDF
Use AI to summarize, explain, and answer questions instantly
Control key screens with voice commands for a standout demo

1. Start with the dashboard and explain that the app combines scanning, PDF tools, AI, and voice control in one workspace.

2. Open a scan or import flow, capture a page, and save it as a PDF.

3. Open AI Assistant and ask for a summary, key points, or a simplified explanation.

4. Finish by showing that major screens can be controlled through the autonomous voice agent.

SmartScan is a smart document workspace that helps users scan physical papers, turn them into organized PDFs, ask AI questions about the content, and even control the app by voice. It brings productivity, accessibility, and automation together in one mobile experience.

SmartScan is a smart document workspace that lets users scan papers, convert them into PDFs, understand them with AI, and control the app with voice. It combines productivity, accessibility, and automation in one simple mobile experience.
Create a short class presentation pitch for SmartScan highlighting document scanning, AI assistance, PDF tools, and voice control.
Summarize the document or conversation in 5 concise bullet points.
Turn this into a short presentation-ready explanation with a clear hook, the core features, and the final impact.
Explain this in simple language that would make sense to a classroom audience.
Extract the key points, next steps, and action items from this content.
Create a sample scan or jump into the AI assistant so every screen still feels presentation-ready.
Create a quick summary, class outline, or talking points before your presentation starts.
